compiled_state.title: [LOCK] tickets: stale/orphan lock tickets not cleaned up by end-session or debug-everything completion
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Incident Overview

After debug-everything sessions end (via /dso:end-session or normal Phase 9 completion), [LOCK] task tickets remain open in the ticket system. Stale lock tickets from crashed or interrupted sessions are also not cleaned up.

## Expected Behavior

1. Phase 9 (success or graceful shutdown) should close the [LOCK] ticket via lock-release
2. /dso:end-session should detect and close any orphaned [LOCK] tickets for the current worktree
3. On session start (lock-acquire), stale [LOCK] tickets from dead sessions should be auto-reclaimed AND closed (not just reclaimed with a new ticket created)

## Actual Behavior

[LOCK] tickets accumulate across sessions. The lock-acquire reclaim path creates a NEW lock ticket but does not close the stale one it detected. End-session does not scan for orphaned [LOCK] tickets.

## Scope

1. agent-batch-lifecycle.sh lock-release: verify it transitions the lock ticket to closed
2. agent-batch-lifecycle.sh lock-acquire LOCK_STALE path: should close the stale ticket after reclaiming
3. /dso:end-session SKILL.md: should include a cleanup step that closes any open [LOCK] tickets for the current worktree
4. Phase 9 of debug-everything: verify lock-release is called on all exit paths (success, graceful shutdown, error recovery)

comments.body: Gate 1a: skipped — CLI_user tag present; intent-aligned assumed
comments.author: Test

comments.body: Classification: behavioral, Score: 2 (BASIC cluster with 001c-f1ed). ROOT_CAUSE: lock-release closes only passed ticket ID; no sweep for orphaned LOCK tickets. Fix approved: add stale-lock sweep in lock-release + Phase 9. Complexity: MODERATE. testing_mode=RED.
comments.author: Test
